name: code-server (browser VS Code)
description: Installs code-server (browser VS Code) and an idempotent start script. The realm template starts it bound to the container loopback (127.0.0.1:8888); it is reached only through the realm port-forward tunnel, so it runs with --auth none and is never exposed.

version.description: code-server release version to install (without leading v). Bump to current stable as needed.
